description: Build complete per-snapshot SVG spec data with provenance, structured value grammar, and derived version overlays.

tasks.title: Define pinned source manifests
tasks.description: Create pinned source manifests for all four snapshots plus foreign references. Done when: each manifest records authority source, pinned ref or TR URL, checksum strategy, expected inputs, and fetch policy.

tasks.title: Define normalized snapshot schema
tasks.description: Design the canonical checked-in data model for snapshot metadata, elements, attributes, grammars, categories, applicability edges, exceptions, and review reports. Done when: file layout, provenance shape, and grammar AST are encoded in repo-facing schemas or types with no ambiguous fields.

tasks.title: Build shared extraction framework
tasks.description: Implement deterministic fetch/cache plumbing and reusable extraction helpers for provenance, authority precedence, and normalized output emission. Done when: snapshot-specific parsers can share fetch, parse, provenance, and write paths without bespoke one-off scripts.

tasks.title: Ingest SVG 1.1 First Edition
tasks.description: Normalize `Svg11Rec20030114` from TR, indices, and flattened DTD into checked-in snapshot data. Done when: element set, attribute set, applicability edges, content rules, grammars, exceptions, and review report exist with provenance.

tasks.title: Ingest SVG 1.1 Second Edition
tasks.description: Normalize `Svg11Rec20110816` from TR, indices, zip bundle, and flattened DTD into checked-in snapshot data. Done when: the 2011 snapshot is fully represented with provenance and review output, ready to serve as a stable comparison spine.

tasks.title: Ingest SVG 2 Candidate Recommendation
tasks.description: Normalize `Svg2Cr20181004` with W3C TR authority and explicit foreign references for externally defined pieces. Done when: SVG-owned facts are checked in with provenance, foreign dependencies are typed, and the review report reconciles snapshot counts against authoritative indices.

tasks.title: Ingest SVG 2 Editor's Draft
tasks.description: Normalize `Svg2EditorsDraft20250914` from the pinned `w3c/svgwg` commit using `publish.xml`, `definitions.xml`, companion definitions files, and chapter HTML. Done when: all draft-native facts are checked in with provenance and a full review report.

tasks.title: Normalize value grammar data
tasks.description: Convert SVG-owned value syntax into the shared grammar AST and attach grammar refs to snapshot facts. Done when: path data, points, transform lists, paint, viewBox, preserveAspectRatio, number-or-percentage, and other SVG-owned grammars are no longer left as opaque strings.

tasks.title: Add typed foreign references
tasks.description: Represent external grammars and modules as pinned typed references instead of ad hoc strings. Done when: animations, filter effects, masking, compositing, ARIA, and CSS-backed value references are encoded with spec, pin, target, and provenance.

tasks.title: Build per-snapshot review pipeline
tasks.description: Add audit generation and review checks for completeness and accuracy. Done when: each snapshot emits a checked-in review report covering counts, unresolved items, applicability coverage, provenance coverage, and manual exception inventory.

tasks.title: Derive union data and version overlays
tasks.description: Generate canonical union artifacts and version-to-version diffs strictly from reviewed snapshot truth. Done when: derived union and overlay files are reproducible, lossless against the snapshot datasets, and no hand-authored profile exceptions remain.

tasks.title: Switch svg-data codegen to reviewed data
tasks.description: Update build-time generation and runtime APIs to read the reviewed snapshot pipeline and derived artifacts. Done when: `svg-data` no longer relies on sparse hard-coded profile membership and generated Rust tables come only from normalized snapshot truth.

tasks.title: Rewire lint and LSP consumers
tasks.description: Move lint, completion, hover, and profile-aware diagnostics onto the generated snapshot truth. Done when: unsupported, deprecated, obsolete, and draft-only behavior comes from reviewed data instead of heuristics or ad hoc overrides.

tasks.title: Add completeness and behavior matrix tests
tasks.description: Add regression tests proving completeness and consumer parity across snapshots. Done when: svg-data, svg-lint, and LSP tests cover snapshot-specific existence, applicability, grammar, hover, completion, and diagnostics behavior with no unsourced fallback paths.
